name: Poppy Strike  3
description: Poppy Strike 3 is a first person shooter where your mission is to survive scary encounters with huggy wuggy, try to shoot given amount of huggy in order to win and unlock new weapons.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim R - Reload G - Grenade Space - Jump
tags: 1 Player, 3D, 3D Games, Action, CSGO, First Person Shooter, Gun, huggy, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, survival, Unity3D
